metadata.description: Embedding-space cross-table predictability on rel-stack. Trains Standard and PRMP HeteroGNN, measures R² trajectories. Tests revised regime theory: low embedding R² -> PRMP doesn't help.

examples.output: {"per_task_analysis": {"post-votes": {"standard": 0.563823, "prmp": 0.072779, "delta": 0.491044, "prmp_better": true}, "user-engagement": {"standard": 0.50468, "prmp": 0.767385, "delta": 0.262705, "prmp_better": true}}, "confound_analysis": {"raw_parent_dims": {"rel-stack/badges__UserId__users": 1, "rel-stack/postLinks__PostId__posts": 1, "rel-stack/postLinks__RelatedPostId__posts": 1, "rel-stack/postHistory__PostId__posts": 1, "rel-stack/postHistory__UserId__users": 1, "rel-stack/votes__PostId__posts": 1, "rel-stack/votes__UserId__users": 1, "rel-stack/posts__OwnerUserId__users": 1, "rel-stack/posts__ParentId__posts": 1}, "embedding_dims": 48, "raw_r2_mean": -2.6e-05, "embedding_r2_mean": -6.444769, "confound_resolved": false}, "key_findings": {"prmp_helps_post_votes": true, "prmp_helps_user_engagement": true, "embedding_r2_mean": -6.444769, "raw_r2_mean": -2.6e-05, "parent_dim1_resolved": false}, "comparison_with_amazon": {"amazon": {"embedding_r2_range": "0.2-0.6", "prmp_helps": true}, "rel_stack": {"embedding_r2_mean": -6.444769, "prmp_helps_regression": true, "prmp_helps_classification": true}}}
